gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (24/343)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (24/343)
text: سُئِلَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الرَّجُلِ يَقُولُ لِلشَّيْ‏ءِ يَبِيعُهُ أَنَا أُهْدِيهِ إِلَى بَيْتِ اللَّهِ الْحَرَامِ قَالَ فَقَالَ لَيْسَ بِشَيْ‏ءٍ كَذِبَةٌ كَذَبَهَا .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, form Ibn Mahboub, from Khalid Bin Jareer, from Abu Al Rabie who said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> was asked about the man who is saying for something which has sold it, ‘I hereby gift it to the House of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, the Sacred’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘It is not with anything. It is a lie which he has lied it’.
en.sarwar: 8. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Mahbub from Khalid ibn Hariz from abu al-Rabi’ who has narrated the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a man who buys something and says, ‘I gift it to the Sacred House of Allah.’ He (the Imam) said, ‘It does not have any valid effect. It is a lie that he has spoken.’”
